query:
INSERT INTO courses (code, title, description, courseType, cpdHours, displayOrder, colorTheme, totalLessons, price) VALUES
('DIV111', 'Capstone Project', 'Culminating course requiring students to integrate knowledge from previous courses into a comprehensive theological research project or ministry portfolio. Includes proposal development, research methodology, and final presentation.', 'theological', 15, 21, '#1e40af', 8, 129),
('DIV112', 'Christology', 'In-depth study of the person and work of Jesus Christ. Examines biblical foundations, historical development of Christological doctrine, contemporary debates, and implications for Christian faith and practice.', 'theological', 10, 22, '#1e40af', 10, 89),
('DIV113', 'Contemporary Theological Issues', 'Exploration of current theological challenges and developments in the modern church. Addresses topics such as religious pluralism, science and faith, social justice theology, and emerging theological movements.', 'theological', 10, 23, '#1e40af', 10, 89);
